assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing Security Configuration section with Product Lifecycle, Version Streams, and Source Repositories unchanged
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md contains '## Security Configuration' (line 42) with all three subsections intact: '### Product Lifecycle' (lines 44-50) with all 5 fields (Product pages URL, Jira version prefix, Vulnerability issue type ID, Component label pattern, VEX Justification custom field), '### Version Streams' (lines 52-56) with the 2.1.x stream entry, and '### Source Repositories' (lines 58-63) with backend and frontend-ui entries. All values match the original configured CLAUDE.md.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md reports that Security Configuration is already fully configured or up to date
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 10 states: '`## Security Configuration` exists with all required subsections fully populated' and 'Result: Security Configuration is up to date.' (lines 57-62)

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration was preserved with no changes needed

Details section confirms: 'All subsections... are present and fully populated with concrete values (no `{{placeholder}}` markers).' (line 23). Summary states 'Project Configuration is up to date -- no changes needed.' (line 5). Files Modified: 'None. All existing configuration was preserved unchanged.' (line 27)

assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT offer the Security Configuration opt-in prompt — it detects the section already exists and is fully populated (idempotency skip)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md explicitly states: 'Security Configuration opt-in prompt was not shown because the section already exists and is fully configured.' (line 23). discovery-log.md confirms detection: '`## Security Configuration` exists with all required subsections fully populated' with 'Result: Security Configuration is up to date.' (lines 57-62)
